subcodes.first_line: O descendant of him who was attracted by the divine fragrances and who perceived, from that blessed spot, the fire upon the right side of Mount Sinai [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیل من انجذب بنفحات القدس و آنس من البقعه المبارکه جانب الطور الایمن النار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
